zh.lifeSummary: 當Margaret Graham of Menteith於1279年出生在英國蘇格蘭皮布萊爾時，她的父親Sir Patrick de Graham44歲，母親Annabelle Strathearn50歲。她於1292年之前與Malcolm Drummond 9th Thane of Lennox在蘇格蘭結婚。他們至少是5個兒子的父母。她去世於1346年在蘇格蘭斯林史爾德門享年67歲，埋葬在英國蘇格蘭洛-爾希爾 本 費亞。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Margaret Graham of Menteith于1279年出生在英国苏格兰皮布萊爾时，她的父亲Sir Patrick de Graham44岁，母亲Annabelle Strathearn50岁。她于1292年之前与Malcolm Drummond 9th Thane of Lennox在苏格兰结婚。他们至少是5个儿子的父母。她去世于1346年在苏格兰斯林史爾德門享年67岁，埋葬在英国苏格兰洛-爾希爾 本 費亞。

nameMeanings.name: Graham
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from Grantham in Lincolnshire, recorded in Domesday Book as Graham (as well as Grantham, Grandham, and Granham). See also Grantham .

Irish (especially Ulster): in Ireland Graham is generally the Scottish name, but it has additionally been adopted as an Anglicized form of both Ó Creacháin (see Crehan ) and Ó Gormghaile (see Gormley ).

History: The surname Graham was taken to Scotland at the beginning of the 12th century by the Norman baron William de Graham, holder of the manor of Grantham in Lincolnshire, from whom many if not all modern bearers are probably descended. The chief of Clan Graham is the Duke of Montrose.

variants.name: Greim
meanings: South German: from a short form of a compound personal name beginning with the element grīm ‘mask, helmet’.

variants.name: Grahm
meanings: Scottish (Lanarkshire and northern England): shortened form of   Graham  .

variants.name: Grantham
meanings: English (Lincolnshire and East Yorkshire): habitational name from Grantham in Lincolnshire, of uncertain origin. The final element is Old English hām ‘homestead’; the first may be Old English grand ‘gravel’ or perhaps a personal name Granta, which probably originated as a byname meaning ‘snarler’. See also Graham .

variants.name: Grahame
meanings: Scottish: variant of   Graham  . — Note: The population figure published by the US Census Bureau for this surname in the year 2000 is as high as 261, while the figure for 2010 is supposedly lower than 100.

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

en.lifeSummary: When Margaret Graham of Menteith was born in 1279, in Peeblesshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, her father, Sir Patrick de Graham, was 44 and her mother, Annabelle Strathearn, was 50. She married Malcolm Drummond 9th Thane of Lennox before 1292, in Scotland. They were the parents of at least 5 sons. She died in 1346, in Drymen, Stirlingshire, Scotland, at the age of 67, and was buried in Hill of Fearn, Ross-shire, Scotland, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margaret Graham of Menteith est née en 1279, à Valle de Twede, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir Patrick de Graham, avait 44 ans et sa mère, Annabelle Strathearn, avait 50 ans. Elle a épousé Malcolm Drummond 9th Thane of Lennox avant 1292, à Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils. Elle est décédée en 1346, à Drymen, Stirlingshire, Écosse, à l’âge de 67 ans, et a été enterrée à Hill of Fearn, Ross-shire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Margaret Graham of Menteith 1279 in Peeblesshire, Schottland, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Patrick de Graham 44 und ihre Mutter Annabelle Strathearn 50. Sie hat vor 1292 in Scotland Malcolm Drummond 9th Thane of Lennox geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne. Sie starb 1346 im Alter von 67 Jahren in Drymen, Stirlingshire, Scotland und wurde in Hill of Fearn, Ross-shire, Schottland, United Kingdom begraben.

ja.lifeSummary: Margaret Graham of Menteithが1279年にイギリススコットランドペエブレシュアイアで生まれた時，父Sir Patrick de Grahamは44歳，母Annabelle Strathearnは50歳であった。1292年以前にスコットランドでMalcolm Drummond 9th Thane of Lennoxと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子の親であった。彼女は1346年にスコットランドスティルリングシュアイアドリメンで67歳で死去し，イギリススコットランドロス-シュアイアヒル オフ フエアルンにて埋葬された。

ko.Hill of Fearn, Ross-shire, Scotland, Uni: 영국 스코틀랜드 로스-실르 힐 프 피른
ko.lifeSummary: Margaret Graham of Menteith(이)가 1279년 영국 스코틀랜드 피블레실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Patrick de Graham(은)는 44세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Annabelle Strathearn(은)는 50세였다. 그녀는 1292년 이전 스컷랜드에서 Malcolm Drummond 9th Thane of Lennox(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1346년 스컷랜드 스티를링실르 드리멘에서 67세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 스코틀랜드 로스-실르 힐 프 피른에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret Graham of Menteith nasceu em 1279, em Peeblesshire, Escócia, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir Patrick de Graham, tinha 44 anos e sua mãe, Annabelle Strathearn, tinha 50 anos. Ela casou-se com Malcolm Drummond 9th Thane of Lennox antes 1292, em Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos. ru.Hill of Fearn, Ross-shire, Scotland, Uni: хилл оф фирн, росс-шир, Шотландия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margaret Graham of Menteith родилась в 1279 г. в местности пиблессхир, Шотландия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Sir Patrick de Graham было 44 года, а матери, которую звали Annabelle Strathearn, 50. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Malcolm Drummond 9th Thane of Lennox перед 1292 г. в местности Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей. Она умерла в 1346 г. в местности дримен, стирлингшир, Шотландия в возрасте 67 лет и была похоронена в местности хилл оф фирн, росс-шир, Шотландия, Великобритания.
